basics.name: Vadim Nicolai
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, Go, and Rust. Expert in modern frontend architectures, microservices, GraphQL APIs, and performance-critical systems. Delivering 5 AI-powered projects with multi-model LLM orchestration, agentic pipelines, RAG search, eval-driven development, and production observability. Domain expertise in E-commerce, FinTech, AI/ML, and enterprise SaaS.
basics.keySkills: React • TypeScript • JavaScript • Next.js • Node.js • Go • Rust • GraphQL • Apollo • REST API • Microservices • gRPC • AWS • Cloudflare • MongoDB • DynamoDB • Docker • CI/CD • Jest • Git • AI/LLM Orchestration

work.name: Vitrifi
work.summary:
• Architected micro-frontend portal using Go microservices with gRPC and OpenAPI, integrating shared React components across multiple teams.
  • Led API migration from REST to GraphQL, implementing Apollo Server in Go and Apollo Client in React, reducing over-fetching and improving performance.
  • Drove frontend architecture and technical leadership across teams, establishing design patterns and enforcing quality through PR reviews.
  • Migrated monorepo from npm to PNPM with Turborepo caching, reducing CI/CD build times.
  • Integration testing strategy with Jest and React Testing Library, automated in CI/CD.
  • Tech stack: Go, Echo, gRPC, GraphQL, Apollo Server, OpenAPI, React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, React Query, Ant Design, Turborepo, PNPM, MongoDB, Jest, React Testing Library

work.name: Wunderman Thompson Commerce
work.summary:
• Built e-commerce shopping cart and checkout components using React and TypeScript.
  • SSR with Next.js for SEO and page load performance.
  • Reusable UI components with Styled Components and atomic design.
  • Payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal) with PCI compliance.
  • Tech stack: React 17, Next.js 10, TypeScript, Styled Components, Jest, React Testing Library

work.name: Event Espresso
work.summary:
• Modernized WordPress plugin admin with React and GraphQL for Event Smart SaaS platform.
  • 50+ merged PRs to open-source repositories.
  • Established SASS/BEM architecture and component library patterns.
  • Unit testing (Jest) and E2E testing (Playwright).
  • Tech stack: React 16, React Apollo, GraphQL, WPGraphQL, WordPress, PHP, MySQL, Jest, Playwright

work.name: Modus Create, Inc
work.summary:
• Project: AARP Money Map — Financial planning platform for AARP, millions of users.
  • UI library with 40+ React components, WCAG 2.1 AA accessible.
  • CI/CD with Bitbucket Pipelines, Sentry, SonarQube, and AWS CodePipeline.
  • Serverless APIs using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB.
  • Tech stack: React 16.8, Hooks, Context API, React Apollo, Serverless Framework, GraphQL, DynamoDB, AWS Lambda

work.name: Atomate
work.summary:
• Project: Travlrr — React component library with HOCs, render props, and compound components.
  • Auth system with AWS Lambda, Auth0, JWT, and MongoDB.
  • RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express.js (JSON:API spec).
  • Code reviews and testing (Jest, Enzyme), reducing production bugs by 30%.
  • Code splitting, lazy loading, tree shaking — 45% smaller bundle.
  • Tech stack: React 16, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, AWS Lambda, Auth0, Redux, Webpack

work.name: DevelopmentAID
work.summary:
• Built full-stack event planning application with Node.js, Express.js, Angular, and MongoDB.
  • Implemented JWT authentication, optimized MongoDB queries and database indexing.

work.name: Endava, ProPeople (FFW Agency), Best4u Group
work.summary:
• Built responsive frontends for enterprise clients including Stanford University (Drupal multisite), .NET applications, and WordPress platforms.
  • Developed custom themes, integrated RESTful APIs, and delivered pixel-perfect implementations using HTML5, CSS3, SASS, and jQuery.

aiProjects.name: Agentic Lead Gen
aiProjects.description: Autonomous B2B platform that finds, qualifies, and emails prospects through a 5-stage agentic pipeline on Cloudflare Workers Containers checkpointed to Neon Postgres.
highlights: Runs 67 LangGraph graphs split 58 core, 7 research, 2 ML across the agentic pipeline.
Apollo Server 5 with Drizzle and 18 DataLoaders fronts a DeepSeek router escalating v4-flash to v4-pro.
Scores engagement sub-millisecond on the hot path with a 12-feature gradient-boosted stump ensemble.
A single-pass Aho-Corasick classifier matches the company taxonomy and retires an LLM call.
A Qwen2.5-1.5B LoRA on Hugging Face scores contact tiers above authority 0.5, cutting compute 10x.
Resend threads outbound via In-Reply-To, HMAC-SHA256 verifies inbound webhooks, and a catch-all MX alias captures replies.

aiProjects.name: ResearchThera.com
aiProjects.description: Therapeutic-intelligence platform for families: clinical chat screens first for drug-induced symptoms, flags Singulair washout cases, and orchestrates 23 LangGraph workflows across medication safety and academic retrieval.
highlights: The 5-stage LlamaIndex chat pipeline reranks, audits safety, and routes 9 intents by confidence.
Computes 7 peer-reviewed cardio-metabolic ratios from lab panels and surfaces them as risk flags.
A Romanian 3-tier lab-PDF parser feeds hybrid full-text and vector search across 8 pgvector indices.
Pharmacology and therapy graphs query DailyMed, openFDA, RxNav, OpenAlex, Crossref, and Semantic Scholar, then cross-encoder rerank.
Iatrogenic-first psych screening runs a critique-refine loop that rewrites axes scoring below 7/10.
Apollo Server 5 backs 217 GraphQL resolvers and two Vercel-AI agents: CYOA stories and CBT/ACT/DBT guidance.

volunteer.summary:
• Contributed 100+ pull requests to core trading engine and exchange connectivity modules in Rust and Python.
  • Built production exchange adapters for dYdX v4 and Hyperliquid with REST, WebSocket, gRPC, authentication, rate limiting, and execution clients.
  • Enhanced OKX and Kraken integrations with historical data support, pagination, and WebSocket reliability improvements.
  • Implemented high-performance technical indicators in Rust with Python/Cython parity, improving PnL calculations and monetary precision.
